_description: Task registry — tracks all tasks assigned to agents. Managed by the task framework.

task.title: string — short description of the task
task.requestedBy: string — who requested the task (e.g., 'tim', agent name)
task.assignedTo: string — agent responsible for the task
task.delegatedTo: string[] — agents this task was delegated to
task.expectedOutput: string — what the requester expects as deliverable
task.status: string — received | planning | in-progress | blocked | completed | failed | cancelled
task.plan: string | null — the agent's execution plan
task.deliverables: string[] — paths or descriptions of output

timeouts.planningMaxMs: number — max time for planning phase
timeouts.totalMaxMs: number — absolute max time for task
